purpose: Freeze reliability/review policies for external replay and stop further MCD-test-driven tuning.

leakage_boundary.final_claim_requirement: No additional threshold/model choices may be made from MCD test outcomes. Final claims require external or fresh locked holdout replay.
leakage_boundary.development_source: MCD train+validation development candidates used in T306 because train-only selected candidates had no unsafe positives.

external_replay_rules: Use the frozen feature contract and thresholds before inspecting external labels.
Do not tune thresholds or model hyperparameters on UBFC, DLCN, 4TU, MR-NIRP, or future held-out data.
If a feature is unavailable in an external adapter, mark the sample as adapter_blocked or use the pre-declared fallback only; do not create dataset-specific thresholds.
Primary endpoint: unsafe/input reduction against t305_selected_release_all at the same external samples.
Secondary endpoints: released MAE, coverage, unsafe/released, and by-domain failure taxonomy.

paper_success_bar.minimum_product_candidate: Coverage >=85% and unsafe/input lower than release-all on adult external replay.
paper_success_bar.q1_claim_candidate: Paired bootstrap CI for unsafe/input reduction excludes zero on pooled external replay, with no clinically unacceptable released-MAE degradation.
paper_success_bar.must_report: Coverage tradeoff, review burden, failure cases, domain strata, and calibration boundary.
